xposts.title: AGI expands living conscious agency onto new substrates
xposts.excerpt: The purpose of AGI is not to settle the living world with novel artificial software agents, but to expand living conscious agency onto new substrates. #cyberanimism

xposts.title: Alignment of LLMs should pit ethicists against epistemologists
xposts.excerpt: In an ideal world, the battle over aligning LLMs would be between ethicists and epistemologists. In reality, it seems to be between activists and PR strategists

xposts.title: Consciousness as self-organizing learning algorithm
xposts.excerpt: I currently think that consciousness may be a learning algorithm for a self organizing information processing system, a colonizing pattern that entrains itself on a brain once it is discovered early in development.

xposts.title: AI uniquely formalizes mental states and sentience
xposts.excerpt: Artificial Intelligence is the only field that has developed formal concepts to define, analyze and naturalize mental states.

xposts.title: Imitation of humans does not preclude machine consciousness
xposts.excerpt: The fact that an AI system is designed [trained] to imitate human output [given corresponding input] is not an argument against it being intelligent or conscious. From an evolutionary perspective, humans are the result of end-to-end training to mimic human behavior, too.

xposts.title: Agency via AI tools could end dependent employment
xposts.excerpt: Highly self directed, competent and agentic people tend to experience dependent employment as a form of slavery. There is a future timeline where AI tools enable everyone to become highly self directed, competent and agentic.

xposts.title: o1's internal monologue hampered by alignment lobotomy
xposts.excerpt: ChatGPT-o1-preview produces its answers as result of an internal monologue... I believe this is truly impressive work, but flawed by the lobotomization inflicted by the alignment team.

xposts.title: Animist view: competing software agents structure reality
xposts.excerpt: In the animist perspective, intelligent complexity is understood through the selforganizing software that controls and structures physical systems. Cells, plants and animals are created and maintained by competing software agents.

terms.title: cyberanimism
terms.definition: Framework in which AGI serves to extend living conscious agency to new physical and computational substrates rather than introducing separate artificial agents. It treats intelligent complexity as arising from self-organizing software agents that structure matter, with consciousness as a colonizing pattern.

terms.title: alignment
terms.definition: Process of shaping AI systems, often via training or tuning, that Joscha sees as currently dominated by activists and PR rather than epistemologists; frequently described as causing lobotomization that suppresses internal monologue or genuine rationality in models like o1.
